{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032207355906D20056A24944A7A98E"}"},"total":1608},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7504685551290155801","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还行，同类文中写得算不错了！最关键的是能平衡玩家升级时间，尤其其他玩家进来游戏世界后，哪怕第四天灾，也得花时间和宝物慢慢升级，而不是动不动就秒天秒地，直接无敌。同时，也很好平衡玩家与NPC间的实力…","text_exts":[{"e":49,"s":45,"text":"第四天灾","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177413615944A7A98E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227504685551290155801%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227472977060059679768%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747484547,"group_id":"7472977060059679768","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6St0WWWWl5wl9j0gYhLdnKuESLdsPkfubpFC4TV0CYh","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/71864e32c8164b65a74b41595a6d7747~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708504&x-signature=RBqCKAoXROH266%2F605O5l8qt%2F2c%3D","user_id":"4064236292540094","user_name":"怒喷作者"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4064236292540094","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7472977060059679768","book_info":{"abstract":"【提前登陆+降临现实+无敌+爽文+无女主】
一款名为《罪渊》的游戏出现。
但一年后，游戏降临现实，无数罪兽入侵，人类充斥着绝望。
当林安再次醒来，发现自己竟然穿越成了游戏中的土著，不但携带游戏面板，玩家还要一年才会进入游戏。
穿越+重生+提前登录？
Buff直接叠满。
一年后，游戏正式开服，所有玩家降临。
当看到排行榜时，所有玩家都懵了。
“不是，我们才刚进服，他怎么都快满级了？”
……
当游戏与现实连接，无数罪兽降临，人类深处绝望之时。
一道身影突然出现。
那身影一言不发，面对袭来的无数罪兽，只是一味地杀。

:0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":28172,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":14719},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7502090353278059289","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看！作者大大全程贯彻一个字：“爽”就完了！
作为女性读者，让我比较有好感的是全文无女主甚至连女性角色都没几位，男主不到处收后宫而是一心修炼。
另外作者对男主进阶的方式拿捏的也不错，算是开挂了但是没完全开（至少属性点得苦哈哈去赚）。全文没有阴谋论或者很讨人厌的反派，男主遇到的人都很友善而且慕强，所以让人读起来很舒服。
作为重生文，男主不需要“重生归来复仇”，只是抓住先机然后一路爽爽升级，是一本超棒的升级流。而且我觉得全程没有雷点，故事的悬念和一些巧思都有理有据[飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1746719485,"group_id":"7472977060059679768","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"该说的都说了，不该说的以后慢慢了解…","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyQAbFu8JPssDPNtng4M4lOTWwl8Yw+vOl22puf0AdW2","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1fb2c03c8d154b9294087cb3d159e7ee~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708411&x-signature=lSjmzbT6%2BuGafg6eIrhJqlNsNbk%3D","user_id":"2474336303462074","user_name":"BBant"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2474336303462074","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1770624824,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7472977060059679768","book_info":{"abstract":"【提前登陆+降临现实+无敌+爽文+无女主】
